race.comment: BLOOMIN' GOLD (10) built on a nice third two starts back here with a win over 1200m at this track four weeks ago, getting home by 1.75 lengths. Maddie Mankelow scored on her last time and retains the ride. Expect another big run. MAYBE (2) started at $7 last time and ran below expectations, finishing fifth at this track over 1200m. Finds a suitable race. VALIANT JOAN (11) progressed nicely last time out to finish just 0.7 lengths from the winner in second over 1000m at Barcaldine. Can play a pivotal role. BOOM BOOM RAY (1) worked home well when resuming so will be fitter and should enjoy the longer trip.
